hero_title: From my spores to your story
hero_desc:
Each commission is cultivated with care, subtlety, and attention to detail.
From OCs to Vtubers, I craft stories that feel alive.
service_desc1: I bring memorable characters to life with personality and depth for games, stories, or mascots.
service_desc2: Exclusive hand-crafted illustrations for gifts, personal use, or commercial projects.
service_desc3: Bring your character to life. I handle design, illustration, and full motion setup for your avatar.
service_desc4: Enhance your stream with custom emotes tailored for every moment.
faq_title1: What kind of art do you make?
faq_desc1: SFW, NSFW (Mild), Gore (Mild), Weapons, Armor, Mecha, PNGTuber, Vtuber, and Complex Backgrounds. If you have a specific idea, just ask and I'll see if it fits my style.
faq_desc2: I do not draw: Extreme/Explicit Gore, Extreme/Explicit NSFW, or Furry content. Requests involving these themes will be declined.
faq_title3: Can I request something not listed?
faq_desc3: Yes! The list shows what I usually do, but I'm not limited to it. Just ask before sending the order if you're unsure.
faq_desc4: Yes. I can draw OCs, game characters, or adaptations based on references.
faq_title5: Do you make art for VTubers or PNGTubers?
faq_desc5: Yes! I can create PNGTubers, VTuber models, expressions, or additional assets. Explain your needs in your inquiry.
faq_desc6: Yes. Detailed backgrounds are part of my work, but price may vary depending on complexity.
faq_title7: How do I place an order?
faq_desc7: Get in touch by sending: Character references/ideas, type of art desired, and important details. Then I can confirm the quote.
review_text1: Hello to me, I'm a review about one of the products Kitty made, how cool is that!?

terms_subtitle: By requesting a commission, you declare that you have read and agree to all terms below.
terms_content:
1. Commission Process
Clients must provide clear descriptions and visual references. The artist reserves the right to decline any request. Full refunds are issued if the artist cancels the project before work begins.

2. Queue and Deadlines
Work is completed in order of arrival. Average turnaround is up to 4 weeks after the start date.

3. Revisions
Major changes allowed during the sketch phase only. Once approved, only minor color adjustments. Late major revisions incur extra fees.

4. Payment
Upfront payment required via Bank Transfer. For large projects: 50% upfront, 50% after sketch.

5. Additional Fees
● Rush Order: +50%
● Commercial Use: +100%
● Privacy (Non-disclosure): +10%

6. Copyright and Usage
The artist retains all copyrights. Personal use is allowed with credit. Removing signatures, reselling, or unauthorized commercial use is prohibited.

7. Commercial Use
Rights must be purchased for merchandise, resale, or monetization.

8. Posting
The artist can post progress and final art on social media/portfolio unless a privacy fee is paid.

9. Refund Policy
● 100% before work starts.
● 60% during the sketch phase.
● Rendering started: Proportional refund under 50%.

10. Conduct
Artist can cancel without refund in case of abusive behavior or harassment.

11. AI and Machine Learning
Art may NOT be used for AI training or machine learning datasets without permission.

12. Acceptance
By commissioning, you agree to all terms described above.
